title: Baker Ross FC887 Acrylic Paint Pot Set - Pack of 24 Colours, Paint Set, Arts and Crafts for Kids, Painting for Kids
features: Acrylic Paint Set: Our mini acrylic paints are perfect for aspiring artists that love painting. There are 24 colours to choose from so that kids can paint whatever picture they desire

Paints for Kids: Our mini acrylic paint pots have handy lids so they can be transported between the home and classroom easily without spills. The lids also stop paint from drying out before the next crafting session
Painting Crafts: Our acrylic paints can be used on a wide range of materials including canvas, paper, wood, card and more!
Included in the Pack: This pack contains 24 mini pots in 24 colours. Pots contain 4.2ml of paint.

Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing the very best art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: Kids can paint their own masterpieces using our mini acrylic paints. The handy lids can then be clipped and sealed shut to keep paint fresh for the next painting session. This pack contains 24 mini pots in 24 colours. Pots contain 4.2ml of paint.
